title: Medieval Loading Screens
description: Instead of the basic and boring loading screens we know and see so often they have been replaced by high quality medieval minecraft views, enjoy!
body:
Loading Screens - Medieval

 

This is a resourcepack for the Loading Backgrounds Mod. This resourcepack adds many medieval themed images to your background when loading up your minecraft worlds.

 

Requires the mod: Loading Backgrounds

 

Can this be used on a server?
Yes, it works on servers.


Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/Swaix](https://www.patreon.com/Swaix)
Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/swaix](https://ko-fi.com/swaix)
Support Server: [https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt](https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt)
